title: atomwrite del subcommand output
description: Result of `atomwrite del` — removes a key (and its value) from a structured config file (TOML/JSON).

path.description: Absolute path to the config file.

removed_value.description: String representation of the removed value, or null if key did not exist.

existed.description: True if the key existed before removal.

format.description: Source config format detected from extension.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the operation in milliseconds.
